name: SQLite – Blog: list users with posts
description: List the first 5 users from the local SQLite blog database, each with their posts embedded.

name: SQLite – Blog: introspect schema
description: Inspect the tables and columns of the local SQLite blog database.

name: PostgreSQL – RNAcentral: list RNA sequences
description: List 10 RNA sequences from the public RNAcentral PostgreSQL database at EBI.

name: Neo4j – Movies demo: actors and movies
description: Query the public Neo4j Movies demo database for the first 5 Movie nodes.

name: REST – JSONPlaceholder: posts with comments
description: Fetch the first 5 posts from JSONPlaceholder and embed their comments.

name: REST – RestCountries: European countries
description: List the first 10 European countries with name, capital, population and flags.

name: REST – Open-Meteo: current weather in Berlin
description: Get the current weather forecast for Berlin from the Open-Meteo free API.

name: REST – PokéAPI: first 10 Pokémon
description: List the first 10 Pokémon from the PokéAPI.

name: REST – Jikan: top anime
description: List the top 5 anime titles from the Jikan MyAnimeList API.

name: OWL ingestion – Blog ontology (Turtle)
description: Parse the blog OWL ontology in Turtle format and extract classes, properties and triple count.
